column1: # FieldMesh node OTA partition table — PINNED.
# This mirrors the Arduino-ESP32 `default.csv` (4 MB) geometry that the node
# has been building against implicitly via `board = esp32dev`. Pinning it in
# the repo removes the risk (plan §3.3 / §14.2) of a future toolchain bump
# silently changing the fleet's slot layout under OTA.
# Two 0x140000 (1280 KiB) OTA app slots. Observed node image ~834 KiB
# KiB headroom per slot. Do NOT shrink a slot below the largest shipped image.
